message:
fix(models): resolve relative file paths in models.json against the config file's parent directory

Previously, file:// value references in models.json headers and api_key
fields were resolved relative to the working directory. Now they resolve
relative to the directory containing the models.json file itself, which
is the expected behavior when configs live in ~/.pi/agent/.

- apply_custom_models() accepts optional base_dir (parent of models.json)
- resolve_value_with_base(): relative file:// paths are joined with base_dir
  when available; absolute paths and shell/env references are unchanged
- resolve_headers_with_base(): passes base_dir through to value resolution
- Original resolve_value/resolve_headers retained as thin wrappers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
